Layout.title: Victor Zarzar | Full Stack Developer
Layout.description: Full Stack Developer with experience in developing modern applications focused on front-end, SEO, accessibility, security, performance and best practices. Working on web and mobile projects.
Layout.ogDescription: Professional portfolio with modern projects and updated technologies.

Manifest.description: Professional portfolio with modern projects and updated technologies.

Header.span: Building clean, performant, and user-friendly web applications.

Skills.p: Some of the technologies I use in my daily life...

About.title: Victor Zarzar | About
About.p: My first contact with programming was in 2009, using SQL Server 2000 and MySQL technologies, creating, restoring, and managing databases, as well as building websites with PHP. Always striving to improve my knowledge on a daily basis, I’m not afraid of the unknown and aim to evolve every day. New challenges are always welcome—I love learning new technologies and solving problems. Passionate about coffee, my vinyl records, and Rock ’n’ Roll, and a guitar enthusiast.🤘🏻🎸

Courses.course1: Zero to Programmer in just 14 classes. Dart and Flutter
Courses.course2: TypeScript from basic to advanced (with React, Express)
Courses.course3: SQL Database from ZERO to Advanced 2023
Courses.course4: SwiftUI Masterclass 2023 - iOS App Development & Swift
Courses.course5: iOS 12 Apps with Swift 5 and Xcode 10 - Basic
Courses.course6: Web Design Course: HTML5, CSS3 and JS + 5 Projects
Courses.course8: Automated Testing + COMPLETE Software Testing Course

Services.title: Victor Zarzar | Services
Services.carddescription1: Modern, responsive websites and web applications
Services.p1: Creation of personalized websites and web applications, focusing on performance, SEO, and user experience.
Services.p2: Development of Android applications with React Native, ensuring a native and high-performance experience.
Services.p3: Building iOS apps using React Native, leveraging a single codebase for multiple platforms.

xlabs.title: XLabs Security
xlabs.description: Developed a full dashboard with authentication, scheduled notifications and admin panel. Frontend with React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind, MUI and Shadcn/UI including dark mode. Tables with PDF/Excel export and operational charts. Cross-platform Flutter app (Android, iOS and Web) with i18n, Provider, Sentry and configurable notifications. REST API in FastAPI from scratch with Docker, Nginx, HTTPS, rate limiting, ELK Stack and Pytest. Maintained FastAPI + MariaDB + Redis APIs with Alembic migrations.

freelance.title: Freelance
freelance.description: Tester Functional, Usability, Load, Localization, Accessibility, Regression.

PrivacyPolicy.p: How we collect, use, and protect your information.
PrivacyPolicy.informationCollectedDescription: We only collect the information you voluntarily provide, such as your name, email address, and message when contacting us through this website's contact form. We may also collect anonymous browsing data, such as visited pages and time spent, for analytics and experience improvement purposes.
PrivacyPolicy.howWeUseDescription: The information collected is used solely to respond to your messages, improve the browsing experience on this website, and, when applicable, send relevant communications with your consent.
PrivacyPolicy.dataSharingDescription: Your personal data is not sold, traded, or transferred to third parties, except when necessary to operate the website through trusted service providers who are also required to keep such information confidential.
PrivacyPolicy.cookiesDescription: This website may use cookies to enhance your browsing experience and understand how the content is used. You can disable cookies in your browser settings, although this may affect some functionality.
PrivacyPolicy.rightsDescription: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time, where applicable under current law. To do so, please use the contact channels available on this website.
PrivacyPolicy.changesDescription: This Privacy Policy may be updated periodically to reflect changes to this website, its services, or legal obligations. We recommend reviewing this page whenever necessary.
PrivacyPolicy.contactDescription: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how your information is handled, please get in touch using the contact form available on this website.
